title: Andhra Shiridi
tagline: Andhra Shiridi — spiritual town of Andhra Pradesh

overview.short: The temple of Andhra Shirdi is located in a small and prosperous village called Balabhadrapuram in Bikkavolu Mandal of East Godavari, located in the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh.
overview.description: The temple of Andhra Shirdi is located in a small and prosperous village called Balabhadrapuram in Bikkavolu Mandal of East Godavari, located in the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. As of 2014, the Temple had been under construction for nine years, with a total budget of ₹30 million Rupees, and another 20 million Rupees planned. The project's goal is to make "Andhra Shirdi" one of the most important and holiest temples in India.

topPlaces.name: Balabhadrapuram
topPlaces.description: Balabhadrapuram is an Indian village in Biccavolu mandal of East Godavari district, Andhra Pradesh.

topPlaces.name: Komaripalem
topPlaces.description: Komaripalem is a village in Biccavolu mandal of East Godavari district in the state of Andhra Pradesh in India.

topPlaces.name: Biccavolu mandal
topPlaces.description: Biccavolu mandal is one of the 19 mandals in East Godavari district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is under the administration of Rajahmundry revenue division and the headquarters are located at Biccavolu village.

topPlaces.name: Biccavolu
topPlaces.description: Biccavolu is a village in East Godavari district in the state of Andhra Pradesh in India. The village is known for its famous Subrahmanya Swamy Temple.

topPlaces.name: Konkuduru
topPlaces.description: Konkuduru is a village in the East Godavari district of Andhra Pradesh, India, located on the banks of Tulyabhaga River, which is a tributary of the Godavari River. The Telugu movie director S. V. Krishna Reddy was born in Konkuduru.

topPlaces.name: Anaparthi
topPlaces.description: Anaparthi (formerly Anapothavaram) is a Town located in Anaparthy mandal, in East Godavari district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh.

topPlaces.name: Mahendrawada
topPlaces.description: Mahendrawada is a village in Anaparthy mandal. East Godavari district of Andhra Pradesh in India.

topPlaces.name: Vedurupaka
topPlaces.description: Vedurupaka is a village in Rayavaram mandal, East Godavari district of Andhra Pradesh state, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Andhra Shiridi?
faq.a: The best time to visit Andhra Shiridi is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Andhra Shiridi?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Rajahmundry Airport (27 km) and the nearest railway station is Vijayawada Junction (155 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Andhra Shiridi?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Andhra Shiridi at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Andhra Shiridi?
faq.a: Stays in Andhra Shiridi start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Andhra Shiridi?
faq.a: The top attractions are Balabhadrapuram, Komaripalem, Biccavolu mandal, Biccavolu, Konkuduru.
